# zstack_license (Resource)

Manages a ZStack license.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `license` (String, Sensitive) The license text to upload.
- `management_node_uuid` (String) The management node UUID used for license upload.

### Read-Only

- `available_cpu_num` (Number) The available CPU quota.
- `available_host_num` (Number) The available host quota.
- `available_vm_num` (Number) The available VM quota.
- `capacity` (Number) The licensed capacity quota.
- `cpu_num` (Number) The licensed CPU quota.
- `expired` (Boolean) Whether the license is expired.
- `expired_date` (String) The expiration date of the license.
- `host_num` (Number) The licensed host quota.
- `issued_date` (String) The issued date of the license.
- `license_type` (String) The license type.
- `platform_id` (String) The platform ID from the license.
- `prod_info` (String) The product information from the license.
- `quota_type` (String) The quota type.
- `source` (String) The source of the license.
- `upload_date` (String) The upload date of the license.
- `user` (String) The license user.
- `uuid` (String) The UUID of the license.
- `vm_num` (Number) The licensed VM quota.
